title: enCore Guards
description: I upgraded an existing storefront to Shopify 2.0 and developed a conversion rate optimization strategy using a limited asset library for the night guard brand enCore Guards.

title: Elements for Life
description: I upgraded an existing Shopify theme and implemented a site-wide conversion rate optimization strategy based on best practices for the raw cacao brand Elements for Life.

title: Earth Runners
description: I worked with the ad agency Mycelium Marketing to develop a custom, conversion-rate-optimized Shopify theme for the minimalist sandal brand Earth Runners.

title: Badesofa
description: I worked with the ad agency Mycelium Marketing to provide ongoing development and conversion rate optimization support to the luxury bath and spa pillow brand Badesofa.

title: Tre Mari Bakery
description: I built an online shop, designed with a strong focus on conversion rate optimization and modern Shopify development best practices, for a medium-sized Italian bakery.

title: Franco Deleo Photography
description: I developed an ecommerce strategy for a photographer, prioritizing cost efficiency and a quick site launch by utilizing existing hosting contracts.
